description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a sharply pointed nose and a streamlined, angular fuselage. The wings are wide and sharply swept back, giving the aircraft an aggressive, high-speed appearance. The body is predominantly dark blue or black with light blue accents and striping, emphasizing its modern, high-tech design. The cockpit is centrally located and appears to be enclosed with a tinted canopy, blending smoothly into the fuselage. The tail section is compact, featuring a single vertical stabilizer and no visible horizontal stabilizers extending beyond the main body. There are no visible engines or landing gear, suggesting a design focused on stealth or advanced propulsion.
description: A futuristic, angular airplane with swept-back wings, a pointed nose, and a dark blue and light blue color scheme. The cockpit is centrally placed and the tail features a single vertical stabilizer.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply pointed nose, wide swept-back wings, and central cockpit with blue striping.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the streamlined, low-profile fuselage and the single vertical stabilizer at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the angular wing structure, compact tail, and the absence of visible engines or exhausts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the sleek profile and the integration of the cockpit into the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, sharply swept wings with angular leading edges and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines present on the exterior.
attribute_tail_design: Single vertical stabilizer with no visible horizontal stabilizers; compact tail configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated smoothly into the fuselage, likely single-seat with a tinted canopy.
